distinctive_features: feathery or spiky appearance for soft rime
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: varies depending on surface and conditions
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: parallel streaks in the direction of wind for hard rime

domain_specific_visual.formation_conditions: forms on windward side of objects

domain_specific_functional.impact_on_aircraft: can spoil lift and cause catastrophic effects
domain_specific_functional.ecological_role: forms on trees and surfaces in cold, foggy conditions

relationships.description: Rime ice forms when supercooled water droplets freeze onto surfaces.
Soft rime is similar in appearance to hoar frost but forms differently.

contextual_attributes.geographic_range: mountainous regions, areas with freezing fog
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: represents winter and cold weather phenomena
